---
title: "Ozan Ozbeker"
subtitle: "Data Scientist & Adjunct Professor"
image: www/images/professional_picture.jpg
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 25em
  links: 
    - icon: github
      text: "GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/ozanozbeker/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ozanozbeker/
    - icon: envelope
      text: "Email"
      href: mailto:ozanozbeker99@outlook.com
comments: false
---

Hello! I'm Ozan, an industrial engineer turned data scientist. My desire to build things started as a child with playing with Legos and only advanced when I discovered Minecraft. Solving problems led me to industrial engineering and my love of computers & coding brought me to the world of data science. Now I'm based in [Morgantown, WV](https://wvtourism.com/morgantown/), working remotely at [OneMagnify](https://onemagnify.com) & lecturing at [West Virginia University](https://wvu.edu).

When I'm not staring at a screen, you’ll likely find me at a live music event, especially if it’s Metal or EDM. If I’m not at a concert, I’m probably cycling, playing the guitar, or tinkering with a new data science project.

On this site, you’ll find my [resume](resume/index.qmd), [projects](projects/index.qmd), & [blog](blog/index.qmd), where I explore various tools and technologies in the data world, along with other topics that pique my interest.

Feel free to reach out and connect!
